step_name: Browser: Verify Members tab — non-leader view
instruction: On Members tab as non-leader, verify: 1. Same 2 member cards visible 2. Responder's own card shows "You" badge 3. NO "Add Member" button (non-leader cannot add members) 4. NO remove button on commander's card (non-leader cannot remove) 5. Commander's card links to /members/{commander.member_tag} Take a screenshot noting absence of leader controls.

expect.description: Non-leader sees members but no Add/Remove controls
